hero.title:
Engineered by data.
Grown by design.
hero.lede: A green bio company founded in 2018. By pairing a data-driven precision smart farm with proprietary MAT bio technology, we produce standardized botanical drug ingredients with the same quality in every batch.

items.label: SLOGAN
items.value: Engineered by Data, Grown by Design.

ceo.name: Ju Jong-Moon
ceo.title:
Technology only becomes an industry
once data proves it.
ceo.body: Pursuing both pharmacy and engineering led me to a single question: how do we lift the latent value of plants up to the standards of medicine? We found the answer in a precision-controlled smart farm and MAT technology. Producing the same-quality material in every batch is the single promise of Woori Smart Bio.
credentials: Ph.D. in Pharmacy · Kyungsung Univ. (2023): Botanical drug API characterization with MAT in plant factories
Ph.D. in Industrial Engineering · Kyungnam Univ. (2003)
Former Tech Advisor at Greenlabs · Former BOD at N.thing
Concurrent Director, Smart Farm Division at Woori Technology

members.name: Ju Jong-Moon
members.bio: Ph.D. in Pharmacy and Engineering. 25+ years in smart farming and plant biology. Holds multiple original MAT patents.

members.name: Jeong Tae-Sung
members.bio: Ph.D. in Pharmacy. Natural-product drug development and commercialization. Former R&D head at Cellmedicine, Wellisup Research, and Gbio.

members.name: Byun Jae-Il
members.bio: Ph.D. in Agricultural Chemistry. Owns cultivation protocols and biomaterial R&D. Former R&D head at KKT Bioresource, NextA, and Gbio.

items: Recognized as a Green Bio enterprise
Designed and installed the Yeoncheon R&D production center
Crohn's-disease botanical API delivered for clinical use
Kale and soybean leaf hydroponic + MAT validation
Woori Smart Bio Co., Ltd. founded

vision.title: Botanical Data Platform.
vision.body: Our ultimate asset is data, not factories. AI-driven new-material discovery, personalized healthcare, and global standard ownership. We evolve into a botanical data platform that owns the cultivation and bioactive data layer.

location.address: 149 Chaok-ro, Yeoncheon-eup, Yeoncheon-gun, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea

hero.title: Technology is our moat.
hero.lede: MAT bio technology and the AI-driven precision smart farm are built around the core requirements of the FDA's five botanical drug guidelines and deliver standardized botanical drug ingredients.

items.name: MAT
items.subtitle: Metabolite Agriculture Technology
items.body: Intentional triggering of secondary metabolite biosynthesis to surface and concentrate active compounds. Precision stressors (UV-B, thermal shock, water deficit, mineral cues) are applied in sequence.

items.name: Precision Smart Farm
items.subtitle: Closed-type Controlled Environment
items.body: Light, temperature, humidity, and nutrient solution are controlled to μmol, °C, and EC precision inside a fully isolated facility. Every step is logged as digital SOP.

items.name: AI Platform
items.subtitle: Botanical Discovery Engine
items.body: Learns from cultivation and bioactive data to predict and design new high-value materials. Moves beyond pure production into an R&D platform.

competition.sectionTitle: We change the axis of competition.
competition.lede: Field cultivation and conventional smart farms cannot reach standardization and high potency at the same time. Synthetic drugs are unsuitable for long-term care. WSB occupies the empty seat: standardized, high-potency botanical material.

moat.sectionTitle: A multi-layered moat that cannot be copied.

layers.name: MAT IP
layers.body: Original patents covering the methods for applying specific stressors to enhance active compound content.

layers.name: Hardware IP
layers.body: Proprietary hardware patents for implementing MAT with precision and standardization.

layers.name: Digital SOP
layers.body: Thousands of environmental-variable combinations that produce a target compound from a target plant at maximum efficiency, captured as a digital cultivation recipe.

hero.title:
One R&D engine.
Three revenue streams.
hero.lede: The same MAT and precision smart farm power three businesses: solution sales, material supply, and a direct-to-consumer brand. A stable revenue base and real growth momentum at the same time.

solution.title: We sell the technology itself.
solution.body: MAT digital cultivation recipes, precision control software, and the controlled-environment hardware stack are sold as one integrated solution.

components.name: MAT SOP
components.body: Plant- and effect-specific digital cultivation recipes

components.name: AI Operating System
components.body: Software that executes the SOP without drift

components.name: Precision Smart Farm
components.body: Hardware that acts as a bio-reactor

material.title: We supply standardized high-potency materials.
material.body: We directly produce and supply cGMP-grade botanical drug APIs, high-potency nutraceutical ingredients, and efficacy-verified cosmetic botanicals.

segments.name: Cosmetic
segments.body: Botanical material verified for safety and efficacy

phytopresso.title:
Phytopresso.
Validating value as a brand.
phytopresso.body: Phytochemical Espresso. A high-concentration line of natural functional compounds, built on our hydroponic Cheongsam ginseng. The brand validates our material in the consumer market.
phytopresso.distribution: B2C distribution is handled by an influencer-marketing specialist. WSB focuses on R&D and production.

hero.title:
20+ patents.
6 botanical pipelines.
Proving a standard with data.
hero.lede: R&D leadership spanning pharmacy, engineering, and agriculture, plus an impossible-to-copy digital SOP. Every additional plant adds a new API on top of the same platform.

pipeline.lede: Ginseng is fully commercial. Isatis is shipping clinical material. Four more pipelines complete R&D and target commercialization in 2026-2027.

items.title: Hydroponic ginseng cultivation increasing ginsenoside content
Composition for menopause symptom prevention and improvement
Isatis hydroponic cultivation increasing indirubin content
Soybean hydroponic cultivation increasing isoflavone content
